arts.ttl: The obvious Rangers change staring Clement in the face that can give fans what they crave in Nice
arts.sum: Will Clement shake things up in the south of France tonight?

arts.ttl: OGC Nice contending with injury crisis as they welcome Rangers for key Europa League clash
arts.sum: OGC Nice are contending with a significant injury crisis as they welcome Rangers in the UEFA Europa League this evening. The season so far has been marred by recurrent injuries…

arts.ttl: Rangers predicted XI v OGC Nice: Philippe Clement’s side near full strength as Belgian returns to France
arts.sum: Former AS Monaco manager Philippe Clement returns to the Côte d’Azur this evening, 18 months after leaving the Principality club, as Rangers take on OGC Nice in the UEFA Europa…

arts.ttl: Rangers fans face Nice nightmare as tickets abruptly CANCELLED 24 hours before Europa League clash
arts.sum: The email reads: "We would like to inform you that due to circumstances beyond the club's control, and taking into account various factors including your position within the stadium, OGC Nice is forced to cancel your reservation for Thursday evening's match. The communication from Nice informs those affected that "due to circumstances beyond the club's control", their tickets have been cancelled and a full refund will be issued.

arts.ttl: OGC Nice predicted XI v Rangers: Franck Haise’s side decimated by injuries
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of OGC Nice’s key UEFA Europa League encounter against Rangers, Franck Haise said that he only has 13 or 14 professional players at his disposal. His options are…

arts.ttl: Listen: Celtic review and Rangers & Hearts previews
arts.sum: Asim Rabbani, Joshua Barrie and Scott Coyne join Jane Lewis for a bumper European Edition

arts.ttl: Malik Tillman changes EVERYTHING for Celtic with new Champions League rules as Rangers fans all left ruing the same thing
arts.sum: Tillman turned PSV's clash with Shakhtar on its head and in doing so gave Celtic a big helping hand

arts.ttl: Watch Nice vs Rangers on TV: Live stream, channel and team news for Europa League clash
arts.sum: Thursday's opponents Nice are in 31st, but just a couple of points from climbing into the play-off spots. Rangers fans can be forgiven for not looking forward to their side's games recently but European football often offers some comforting solace for the dread-filled fans.

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement hit with ultimate Rangers charge by John Brown as key sin could leave him 'out of a job'
arts.sum: The Belgian is facing major scrutiny going into the Europa League clash with Nice

arts.ttl: Clement reveals 'really good' talks with incoming Rangers chief executive
arts.sum: Philippe Clement says he has had "really good" talks with new Rangers chief executive Patrick Stewart and is glad "a vacuum" at the club has been filled.
